repos.name: access-to
repos.description: Central hub and landing site for the Access To ecosystem
repos.tagline: Open-source AI tools closing the access gaps that matter most
use_cases: Discover which Access To skill fits your practice area
Contribute new pillar content or improve existing skills
Track ecosystem health and cross-pillar connections

repos.name: access-to-housing
repos.description: PropTech intelligence, market analysis, Fair Housing compliance
repos.tagline: AI-powered real estate intelligence for informed decisions
use_cases: Run a comparative market analysis with climate risk scoring
Check Fair Housing compliance before listing a property
Generate an investment feasibility report for multifamily housing

repos.name: access-to-jobs
repos.description: WIOA navigation, job matching across 114 Missouri counties
repos.tagline: Workforce navigation for every Missouri county
use_cases: Match a job seeker to WIOA-eligible training programs in their county
Navigate On-the-Job Training funding requirements
Build a career pathway from assessment to placement

repos.name: access-to-health
repos.tagline: Guiding families through healthcare access and benefits
use_cases: Determine Medicaid eligibility and walk through the application process
Compare Medicare Advantage plans for a client's specific needs
Navigate CHIP enrollment for children in a mixed-status family

repos.name: access-to-business
repos.description: Startup guide, entrepreneur support, business launch
repos.tagline: From idea to launch — AI-guided startup support
use_cases: Build a lean business plan with market validation steps
Navigate Missouri business registration and licensing
Identify startup funding sources and grant programs

repos.name: access-to-services
repos.description: Social services navigation, benefits matching, workforce dev
repos.tagline: Connecting people to the services they need, faster
use_cases: Screen a client for eligibility across multiple benefit programs
Build a coordinated service plan spanning housing, health, and employment
Navigate TANF recertification requirements step by step

repos.name: access-to-education
repos.description: Standards alignment, lesson planning, teacher growth for Missouri K-12
repos.tagline: Standards-aligned AI tools for Missouri educators
use_cases: Align a lesson plan to Missouri Learning Standards with differentiation
Generate a professional growth plan tied to student outcomes
Design a cross-curricular unit connecting ELA and social studies

repos.name: access-to-safety
repos.description: Safety planning, risk assessment, protective orders, crisis resources
repos.tagline: Trauma-informed AI for safety planning and crisis response
use_cases: Build a personalized safety plan addressing housing, health, and legal needs
Walk through the protective order filing process step by step
Identify local crisis resources and warm handoff protocols
